thesis.title: Classification of Histopathological Images for Lung Cancer Detection using Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DCGAN) Model

relevant_projects: PGM Image Manipulation Program in C
Video Player Application using C++ and Qt

key_outcomes: Developed 10+ e-commerce web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and backend developers to implement Figma designs and integrate RESTful APIs respectively.
Coordinated with stackholders upon design and execution.
Implemented SSR, SSG, and dynamic routing in Next.js to improve SEO and optimize content delivery.
Integrated internationalization (i18n) for multilingual support (EN/AR) and dynamic content rendering.

projects.title: DubbelDutch
projects.description: A Browser extension to facilitate language acquisition by injecting synchronized dual-language subtitles into Dutch streaming services.
projects.context: Mainstream platforms like NPO Start and Kijk.nl lack accessibility features for language learners. I needed a way to intercept closed captions and overlay a secondary translation layer without breaking the native video player's state.
projects.execution: Built using the WXT framework, the extension leverages MutationObservers to detect subtitle changes in real-time. I implemented a robust synchronization engine that accounts for varying DOM structures across different VOD providers.
projects.challenge: Bypassing anti-tamper measures on native video players and ensuring subtitle rendering remained fluid during high-bitrate 4K playback.
features: Real-time DOM injection via MutationObserver
Cross-platform support for NPO Start and Kijk.nl
Customizable UI overlay with CSS variable support
Automated subtitle timing offset correction

projects.title: AgriteQ
projects.description: A large-scale exhibition management ecosystem for Qatar’s International Agricultural Exhibition, featuring high-concurrency exhibitor workflows.
projects.context: The existing manual approval process for hundreds of international exhibitors was inefficient. The goal was to digitize the entire lifecycle from application to floor-space allocation.
projects.execution: Architected a reactive fullstack system using Convex for real-time data sync and WorkOS for enterprise-grade authentication. I designed the dashboard as a multi-tenant interface to handle various government and exhibitor roles.
projects.challenge: Ensuring data integrity across complex multi-stage approval workflows while providing real-time analytics to exhibition organizers.
features: Role-based access control (RBAC) via WorkOS
Reactive database schema with Convex
Automated PDF document generation for approvals
Exhibitor analytics dashboard with real-time reporting

projects.title: CineDB
projects.description: A performance-focused movie discovery platform that transforms the massive TMDB database into a fluid, cinematic browsing experience.
projects.context: I wanted to build a media discovery tool that felt native and 'expensive.' The challenge was managing a massive external API while keeping the UI snappy.
projects.execution: I utilized Next.js Server Components for initial SEO-friendly loads and client-side Zustand for state management. Integrated framer-motion for 60fps layout animations.
projects.challenge: The biggest hurdle was synchronizing the URL state with complex filters to ensure deep-link persistence across the application.
features: Native-feeling Infinite Scroll with loading skeletons
Dynamic URL-synchronized filtering system
Real-time search with 300ms debounce logic
High-fidelity video trailer integration via Modals

projects.title: Green Code Analyzer
projects.description: A sustainable software engineering tool that calculates the SCI (Software Carbon Intensity) score for enterprise Java applications.
projects.context: With the rise of 'Green IT' in Europe, there is a lack of tooling for developers to measure the environmental impact of their code at the API level.
projects.execution: Integrated the Green Software Foundation’s SDK into a Spring Boot backend. The system analyzes resource consumption metrics to estimate the CO2 footprint of specific service calls.
projects.challenge: Normalizing energy consumption data across different cloud provider regions and hardware profiles for accurate carbon estimation.
features: SCI Score calculation based on GSF standards
Automated carbon footprint reporting via REST API
Spring Boot Actuator integration for real-time monitoring
Extensible hardware profile mapping system

projects.title: 4K Video Pipeline
projects.description: A distributed orchestration engine designed to manage the heavy-compute lifecycle of processing ultra-high-definition video files.
projects.context: Processing 4K video is resource-intensive. I needed a system that could handle file uploads, queue transcoding tasks, and visualize processing health.
projects.execution: Built a Java-based worker system for FFmpeg orchestration and a Next.js frontend with D3.js to visualize the transcoding progress and system load across nodes.
projects.challenge: Managing large binary data transfers and maintaining low-latency updates between the backend workers and the D3.js dashboard.
features: Distributed task queuing for video transcoding
Real-time progress visualization with D3.js
FFmpeg-driven thumbnail and preview generation
Horizontally scalable worker node architecture

projects.title: Lung Cancer Detection
projects.description: A Bachelor thesis project utilizing DCGANs for medical image augmentation to improve the accuracy of lung cancer detection in CT scans.
projects.context: Early detection is critical, but medical datasets are often imbalanced or small. I explored generative models to solve the 'data scarcity' problem in oncology.
projects.execution: Developed a Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DCGAN) to generate synthetic CT scans, which were then used to train a classification model.
projects.challenge: Balancing the GAN's stability to ensure the generated medical images were clinically relevant and not just 'noise.'
features: Custom DCGAN architecture for medical image generation
92% classification accuracy on augmented datasets
DICOM image preprocessing pipeline in Python
FastAPI endpoint for real-time scan inference

side-projects.title: Advent of Code Challenge 2025
side-projects.description: A series of coding puzzles from the Advent of Code event, designed to practice algorithmic thinking, problem-solving, and learning new programming techniques in JavaScript.

side-projects.title: Flip Card Component - Animate UI
side-projects.description: A reusable React component that flips smoothly to reveal content on the back side, adding interactive animations to web interfaces and enhancing user experience with motion and Tailwind CSS.

side-projects.title: 1 Billion Rows Challenge (Java)
side-projects.description: An experiment in high-performance Java data processing, focused on efficiently parsing and aggregating massive weather datasets using streams, hash maps, and multithreading techniques.
